escorted both inmates to Restrictive Housing

inmate_injuries: Williams: cut over left eye, bleeding, 3 sutures to eyebrow
narrative_facts: Inmates Smith and Williams were fighting in 8 Barracks.
The reporting officer arrived and observed Smith on top of Williams throwing punches.
Williams had a cut over his left eye and was bleeding.
Sgt Peterman pulled Smith off and cuffed him.
Cpl Powell and Cpl Sohns escorted both inmates to Restrictive Housing.
Williams was seen by the Infirmary and received 3 sutures to his eyebrow.
Photos were taken of Williams' injuries and blood on the floor.
Both inmates claimed the other started the fight.
quotes: that pussy been running his mouth all week, I told him I'd fuck him up
restraints_applied_by: Sgt Peterman cuffed Smith, Cpl Powell cuffed Williams
medical_disposition: Williams seen by Infirmary — 3 sutures to eyebrow; Smith refused medical
photo_video_obtained: Photos taken of Williams injuries & blood on floor
